parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'kodefikasi', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(k.* ORDER BY k.path), '[]'::json) FROM "SIMAPO".kodefikasi_barang k),
  'rekening', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(r.* ORDER BY r.kode), '[]'::json) FROM "SIMAPO".rekening_belanja r),
  'barang', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(b.* ORDER BY b.nama), '[]'::json) FROM "SIMAPO".barang b WHERE b.instansi_id = '{{ ($json.query.instansi_id || $json.params?.instansi_id || 'bapperida').toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}'),
  'periode', (SELECT json_build_object('bulan', EXTRACT(MONTH FROM NOW())::int, 'tahun', EXTRACT(YEAR FROM NOW())::int))
) as data

WITH nota AS (
  INSERT INTO "SIMAPO".penerimaan_barang (instansi_id, no_nota, tgl_nota, penyedia, total_nilai, no_sp2d, kontrak, sub_kegiatan, status_spj, created_by)
  VALUES (
    '{{ .instansi_id }}',
    '{{ .no_nota }}',
    '{{ .tgl_nota }}',
    '{{ .penyedia }}',
    {{ .total_nilai }},
    '{{ .no_sp2d }}',
    '{{ .kontrak }}',
    '{{ .sub_kegiatan }}',
    '{{ .status_spj }}',
    '{{ .created_by }}'
  )
  RETURNING id
)
SELECT nota.id FROM nota

INSERT INTO "SIMAPO".detail_penerimaan (penerimaan_id, barang_id, volume, harga_satuan, total_harga)
VALUES
{{ $json.detail_rows }};

-- Update stok barang
WITH items AS (
  SELECT d.barang_id, SUM(d.volume) as vol
  FROM "SIMAPO".detail_penerimaan d
  WHERE d.penerimaan_id = '{{ $json.nota_id }}'
  GROUP BY d.barang_id
)
UPDATE "SIMAPO".barang b
SET stok_saat_ini = COALESCE(b.stok_saat_ini, 0) + i.vol
FROM items i
WHERE b.id = i.barang_id;

UPDATE "SIMAPO".penerimaan_barang
SET status_spj = '{{ $json.body.status_spj }}', updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = '{{ $json.body.id }}'
RETURNING id, status_spj, updated_at

SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(p.* ORDER BY p.tgl_pemeliharaan DESC), '[]'::json) as items
FROM "SIMAPO".pemeliharaan p
WHERE p.barang_id = '{ ($json.query.barang_id || '').toString() }'
  AND p.instansi_id = 'WHERE b.instansi_id = '{{ ($json.query.instansi_id || $json.params?.instansi_id || 'bapperida').toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}''

INSERT INTO "SIMAPO".pemeliharaan (instansi_id, barang_id, tgl_pemeliharaan, jenis_pemeliharaan, biaya, nama_penyedia, bentuk_kontrak, keterangan)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.body.instansi_id || 'bapperida' }}',
  '{{ $json.body.barang_id }}',
  '{{ $json.body.tgl_pemeliharaan }}',
  '{{ $json.body.jenis_pemeliharaan }}',
  {{ $json.body.biaya || 0 }},
  '{{ ($json.body.nama_penyedia || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.body.bentuk_kontrak || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ ($json.body.keterangan || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
)
RETURNING id

-- Nota tanpa BKU
SELECT 'nota_tanpa_bku' as status, p.id as penerimaan_id, NULL as bku_id, p.no_nota, p.tgl_nota, p.total_nilai, NULL as pengeluaran
FROM "SIMAPO".penerimaan_barang p
WHERE p.instansi_id = 'WHERE b.instansi_id = '{{ ($json.query.instansi_id || $json.params?.instansi_id || 'bapperida').toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}''
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "SIMAPO".bku b WHERE b.tgl = p.tgl_nota AND b.pengeluaran = p.total_nilai)
UNION ALL
-- BKU tanpa nota
SELECT 'bku_tanpa_nota' as status, NULL, b.id, NULL, b.tgl, NULL, b.pengeluaran
FROM "SIMAPO".bku b
WHERE b.instansi_id = 'WHERE b.instansi_id = '{{ ($json.query.instansi_id || $json.params?.instansi_id || 'bapperida').toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}''
  AND b.pengeluaran > 0
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "SIMAPO".penerimaan_barang p WHERE p.tgl_nota = b.tgl AND p.total_nilai = b.pengeluaran)
UNION ALL
-- Cocok
SELECT 'cocok' as status, p.id, b.id, p.no_nota, p.tgl_nota, p.total_nilai, b.pengeluaran
FROM "SIMAPO".penerimaan_barang p
JOIN "SIMAPO".bku b ON b.tgl = p.tgl_nota AND b.pengeluaran = p.total_nilai
WHERE p.instansi_id = 'WHERE b.instansi_id = '{{ ($json.query.instansi_id || $json.params?.instansi_id || 'bapperida').toString().replace(/'/g, "''") }}''
ORDER BY tgl_nota DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 200
